Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Hopkins Renovation & Design transformed our outdated kitchen into a dream space! The team was professional, communicative, and paid incredible attention to detail. We especially appreciated their help with selecting the perfect countertops and backsplash. Highly recommend!

D
David R.

We hired Hopkins to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. The new shower is amazing, and the tile work is beautiful. There were a couple of minor delays, but the team was always responsive and addressed our concerns promptly.

J
Jessica L.

Hopkins Renovation & Design did an excellent job finishing our basement. They turned an unused space into a functional and comfortable living area for our family. The project was completed on time and within budget. We would definitely use them again.

M
Michael B.

We love our new deck! Hopkins Renovation & Design designed and built a beautiful deck that's perfect for entertaining. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the team was a pleasure to work with. They really understood what we wanted and delivered a fantastic result.

Additional General Contractor Services

Kitchen Remodeling Bathroom Remodeling Basement Finishing Deck & Patio Construction

Hopkins Renovation & Design — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every general contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Hopkins Renovation & Design Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific general contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Atlanta & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Atlanta, GA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Marietta Roswell Alpharetta Johns Creek Kennesaw Smyrna Sandy Springs Dunwoody
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our general contractor services.

How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?

The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 6-12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed schedule upfront and keep you informed throughout the process.

Do I need to move out during the renovation?

While it's not always necessary, it can be more comfortable to relocate during the demolition and major construction phases. We'll work with you to minimize disruption and keep essential areas accessible.

What is the cost of a kitchen remodel in Atlanta?

Kitchen remodel costs in Atlanta will vary widely based on size, materials, and complexity. We offer free consultations to provide accurate, detailed estimates.

Built on Atlanta Values

Contact us today for a free consultation and let's discuss your renovation dreams.

Let's Begin →
